get.description:
Permissions needed: VIEW_APPOINTMENTS
Get all appointments in a given interval for a given clinic and vet

parameters.name: filter[visit_type_id]
parameters.description: Filter by visit type ID

parameters.name: filter[date_before]
parameters.description: Date before(Y-m-d)

parameters.name: filter[date_after]
parameters.description: Date after(Y-m-d)

parameters.name: filter[statuses]
parameters.description: Statuses of appointments to fetch. Options `0` - Pending `1` - Pending Client Approval `2` - Pending Clinic Approval `3` - Rescheduled Clinic Approval `4` - Rescheduled Client Approval `5` - Confirmed `6` - Canceled By Client `7` - Canceled By Clinic' `8` - Automatically Created' `9` - No Show

parameters.name: filter[patient.owners.id]
parameters.description: Pet Parent ID

parameters.name: filter[date_between]
parameters.description: Dates Between (start_date, end_date), format: YYYY-MM-DD

parameters.name: filter[last_fetched]
parameters.description: Last Appointment Fetched

parameters.name: include
parameters.description:
Additional info to include. You can use multiple, comma separated. Options:   patient,patient.species,patient.breed,patient.crossBreed,patient.owners,patient.owners.appDownloadNotification,patient.owners.clients,room,event,
services (service-packages), clinic,clinic.rooms,vet,vet.vetRolesAll,requests,notes,consentForms,consentForms.printableFile,visitType,visitType.tailsIntakeRule

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Sort by. You can use multiple, comma separated. Options: datetime_start_utc

post.description:
Permissions needed: CREATE_APPOINTMENTS Create Appointment

Start Date and End Date is set as is format(2022-10-20 10:09:00), no alterations are done, so queries will return the exact date and time that was set.
- Status enum is visible under the appointments change status method
- record_id, room_id and examination_id must be set as null if not used.

parameters.name: include
parameters.description:
Additional info to include. You can use multiple, comma separated. Options:   patient,patient.species,patient.breed,patient.crossBreed,patient.owners,patient.owners.appDownloadNotification,patient.owners.clients,room,event,
clinic,clinic.rooms,vet,vet.vetRolesAll,requests,notes,visitType,paymentDeposits.paymentLinks

notify_owner.description: `0` - No Notification, `1` - Only Email, `2` - Only SMS, `3` - Only App, `4` - Email & SMS, `5` - Email & App, `6` - SMS & App, `7` - Email, SMS & App,

notify_owner_mode.description: Another way to describe the notification mode, can be used instead of `notify_owner`

status.description: `1` - Pending Client Approval `2` - Pending Clinic Approval `3` - Rescheduled Clinic Approval `4` - Rescheduled Client Approval `5` - Confirmed `6` - Canceled By Client `7` - Canceled By Clinic' `8` - Automatically Created' `9` - No Show

record_id.description: Record ID - set null if not used

room_id.description: Room ID - set null if not used

examination_id.description: Examination ID - set null if not used

datetime_start_utc.description: Start Date in UTC ISO Zulu format

datetime_end_utc.description: End Date in UTC ISO Zulu format

user_note.description: Notes introduced by the pet parent
user_note.example: Daisy has not been feeling well

source.description: `0` - Added by clinic `1` - Requested via Web `2` - Requested via App

notify_owner_mode.description: Another way to describe the notification mode, can be used instead of `notify_owner`

status.description: `1` - Pending Client Approval `2` - Pending Clinic Approval `3` - Rescheduled Clinic Approval `4` - Rescheduled Client Approval `5` - Confirmed `6` - Canceled By Client `7` - Canceled By Clinic' `8` - Automatically Created' `9` - No Show

post.description:
Permissions needed: any of (CREATE_CHECKUPS, VIEW_COUNTER_SALE)
Creates a new charge for a specific pet parent and clinic and returns it.

parameters.name: include
parameters.description: Additional info to include:  mainSale,mainPayment,payments,chargeReceipt

clinic_id.description: Clinic is on which pet parent is client on.

sale_id.description: Id of sale to associate the charge to, if as_credit is false the sale will be paid first if there are multiple due sales and amount is greater than sale amount due

payment_method_id.description: The payment method id to use for this charge.

as_credit.description: If true charge is not applied to due sales and is kept as client credit

card_brand: The card brand field can only be provided on Payments with Cards

parameters.description: Additional info to include. You can use multiple, comma separated. Options: country,owner, reminderPeriods

get.summary: Get a list of all Communications with a specific PetParent
get.description: Get all appointments

parameters.name: filter[content]
parameters.description: Filter subject and content

parameters.name: filter[email]
parameters.description: Destination email or users email

parameters.name: filter[phone]
parameters.description: Destination phone or users phone

parameters.name: filter[channels]
parameters.description: The channels of the Client Communcations, array of values from CommunicationChannelEnum (e.g. phone, other, email, sms)

parameters.name: filter[types]
parameters.description: The types of the Client Communcations, array of values from CommunicationTypeEnum

parameters.name: filter[statuses]
parameters.description: The statuses of the Client Communcations, array of values from CommunicationStatusEnum

parameters.name: filter[is_attached]
parameters.description:
- `true` - return only communications that are associated with a record.

- `false` - return only communications that are not associated with a record.

parameters.name: include
parameters.description: Additional info to include. You can use multiple, comma separated.

parameters.name: slim_resource
parameters.description: Return a slim version for related record

post.summary: Log a new Client Communication history
post.description: Manually register a new communication between a Clinic and a PetParent

user_id.description: Id of the PetParent that the Clinic communicates to.

patient_ids.description: Id of the patients related to the communication.

clinic_id.description: Id of the Clinic from where the communication is made from.

channel.description: The channel of the communication. Enum. One of phone, other, sms, email. API limited only to phone & other.

content.description: The content of communication. (required for email)

destination.description: Where the communication is sent to ( only for sms/email/phone ).

communicated_at.description: The communicated_at when the communication was made.

message_id.description: The id used for identifying attachments when channel is mail.

content.example: Longer content related to the communication

post.description:
Permissions needed: NONE
This endpoint is used to create the consolidated invoice for selected sales - all sales must belong to same customer.

selectedSalesDetails.description: Contains details of selected sales that has been consolidated.

id.description: Sale record or counter sale id

number.description: Sale record number, null for counter sale

pet.description: Pet details - if sale is from a pet record

post.description:
Permissions needed: NONE
This end point is used to update a consolidated invoice.

selectedSalesDetails.description: Contains details of selected sales that has been consolidated.

id.description: Sale record or counter sale id

number.description: Sale record number, null for counter sale

pet.description: Pet details - if sale is from a pet record

post.description:
Permissions needed: NONE This end point is used to preview the consolidated invoice for selected sales, if no sale is selected all customer sales eligible for consolidation are used - create flow.
If ID of a already consoliated sale is provided (in body an in path also!!!)then preview of existing consolidated invoice is returned - update flow.
property notConsolidatedSalesDetails from response Contains details for all customer sales eligibe for consolidation process.
property selectedSalesDetails from response Contains details of selected sales for consolidation process. null - if the request is made with empty sales_ids parameter

consolidating_sale_id.description: Required for a existing consolidated invoice preview - on update flow

consolidatingSaleId.description: Consolidating sale id for existing consolidated invoice preview - on update flow

notConsolidatedSalesDetails.description: Contains details for all customer sales eligibe for consolidation process

id.description: Sale record or counter sale id

number.description: Sale record number, null for counter sale

pet.description: Pet details - if sale is from a pet record

selectedSalesDetails.description: Contains details of selected sales for consolidation process. null - if the request is made with empty sales_ids parameter

id.description: Sale record or counter sale id

number.description: Sale record number, null for counter sale

pet.description: Pet details - if sale is from a pet record

parameters.description: Should be used in conjuction with `filter[mapped_to_external_products]` to indicate to external products of which provider returned product should be or not be mapped to

recommended_unit_price.description: Represent the main unit price with vat, is equal to price_with_vat

recommended_subunit_price.description: Represent the subunit price with vat, is equal to price_with_vat

is_used.description: available in the show endpoint of a specific product. Marks if the stock of the product has already been used. Formula can't be updated after product is used

minimum_price.description: When the total price of the line item is less than this value, the prices will change with this value

price_threshold.description: These thresholds are used to in order to change the price (unit or subunit) of the product based on the quantity that is sold.

status.description: `1` - Pending Client Approval `2` - Pending Clinic Approval `3` - Rescheduled Clinic Approval `4` - Rescheduled Client Approval `5` - Confirmed `6` - Canceled By Client `7` - Canceled By Clinic' `8` - Automatically Created' `9` - No Show

notify_owner.description: `0` - No Notification, `1` - Only Email, `2` - Only SMS, `3` - Only App, `4` - Email & SMS, `5` - Email & App, `6` - SMS & App, `7` - Email, SMS & App,

notify_owner_mode.description: Another way to describe the notification mode, can be used instead of `notify_owner`

Archive.title: Archive
Archive.description: Slim resource for archive, usually attached to other resources. Same as PetArchive

breed.description: Breed translated in the vet language

Charge.title: Charge
Charge.description: A charge is the act of the customer paying the clinic. A charge can later on be allocated to different sales through payments. If no sale is outstanding, the charge will be left as a credit in the customer's account.

type.description: `1` - Cash `2` - Card `3` - Order `5` - Online `6` - Check `7` - Other `9` - Care Credit

main_sale_id.description: Sale id charge is associated to

address.example: Yigal Alon St 126, Tel Aviv-Yafo, 6744332, Israel

period.description: Reminder will be sent X days/weeks/months (period_type) before the appointment

notification_type.description: * `0` - Upcoming Reminder, * `1` - Recommended Reminder, * `2` - Product Reminder,

Event.title: Event
Event.description: A scheduled event in a clinic. Viewable on the calendar.

File.title: File
File.description: A file that was uploaded to the system and that is linked to a pet. No more than 10MB in size. The file can be a photo, a document, a video, etc. A file can also be associated or not with a record.

file_id.description: The id of the record that the uploaded file is associated to.

InvoiceDetailed.title: InvoiceDetailed
InvoiceDetailed.description: A more detailed version of the Invoice which contains information about the products and services that were sold as well as a more debunked version of the totals involved in the sale.

Me.title: Me
Me.description: General information about the logged in user.

is_active.description: If the user is active in comet-chat

is_verified.description: If the user has a verified comet-chat account

user.description: One of the following: Vet, Clinic, PetParent

Payment.title: Payment
Payment.description: A payment is the act of allocating a charge to a sale. A payment can be made in full or partially.

public_notes.example: Optio eos quisquam necessitatibus nihil omnis. Est earum modi rerum delectus. Aut ipsam sapiente eveniet aperiam ex est.

internal_notes.example: Tempore eaque ut nihil repellendus beatae. Harum et molestias et dolores quos. Velit omnis quos ex modi tenetur sint. Incidunt omnis cum ad nihil voluptas sint.

address.example:
71936 Dimitri Station Apt. 627
New Britney, NJ 77974-6353

Pet.title: Pet
Pet.description: A pet is an individual entity unique in all of Figitail. A pet can have a single PetParent, multiple contact persons and can be present on multiple clinics. The linkage between a pet and a clinics is called a patient.

items.title: Patient
items.description: The patient entity represents the many-to-many link between a Pet and a Clinic. It holds information that is specific to the relationship between the pet and the clinic, such as the pet's status at that clinic, the internal number.

PetArchive.title: PetArchive
PetArchive.description: The record of a pet being archived. Larger version of the simple Archive

archive_type_id.description: `1` - Deceased `2` - Moved away `3` - Change of owner `4` - Other

PetArchiveType.title: PetArchiveType
PetArchiveType.description: The reason why a pet was archived

PetParent.title: PetParent
PetParent.description: PetParent = User = Customer = Owner. PetParent is the preferred term.

items.title: Client
items.description: relationship between pet parent and clinic

Prescription.title: Prescription
Prescription.description: Prescriptions can be dispensed to patients for medications.

label.example: Administer 1 tablet by mouth every 12 hours for 7 days

PrintedFile.title: PrintedFile
PrintedFile.description: A PrintedFile represents either a form or a certificate that has been created for a patient.

Record.title: Record
Record.description: Record = NewFileCase = Consultation = Soap. Record is the preferred naming.

Refill.title: Refill
Refill.description: An individual refill of a prescription.

ReminderProtocolUsage.title: ReminderProtocolUsage
ReminderProtocolUsage.description: Reminder protocol usage is a record of a treatment that was given to a pet triggered by reminder protocol template.

due_date.description: This date is in the clinic's timezone, this will be deprecated in the future so please use the due_date_utc field

administration_date.description: This date is in the clinic's timezone, this will be deprecated in the future so please use the administration_date_utc field

example.name: Reminder Protocol Template Overwritten by this Protocol
Reminder Protocol Template that Overwrites this Protocol

items.title: ReminderProtocolUsageItem
items.description: Reminder protocol usage item is a type of item that triggered the creation of a reminder protocol usage on a record.

Room.title: Room
Room.description: A room in a clinic where appointments can be made. Used for organizational purposes.

counter_sale.description: Id of the realted counter sale

status.description: `0` - Pending `1` - Pending `2` - Paid `3` - Partially Paid `4` - Paid (Overdraft)

consolidated.description: A consolidated sale is a group of sale. A consolidated sale can't have direct products or services associated with it.

SaleCustomer.title: SaleCustomer
SaleCustomer.description: Custom information about a PetParent that is related to a sale.

ServicePackage.title: ServicePackage
ServicePackage.description: ServicePackage = Services. A service package is a collection of services and products that are sold together. It is a way to group multiple lab test/products together to make it easier to sell them. For example, a service package might include a blood test, and a few products. Service packages can also not contain any products or lab tests, for example, a grooming session. A service package appears as an individual line item on the sale/invoice.

species.description: The name translated in the language of the vet accessing the resource

Tag.title: Tag
Tag.description: Tags are purely informative and can be used to categorize pets or petParents in the system.

Taggable.title: Taggable
Taggable.description: Taggable is the pivot in the many-to-many relationship between a tag and an entity (petParent or pet)

Vet.title: Vet
Vet.description: A vet is the user of the system. A vet is any member of the animal hospital staff that has an account in Digitail. Each user has a specific role in the system and can be associated with multiple clinics.

has_chat_user.description: true if chatUser is active, false if non-existent or inactive

has_intake_enabled.description: only valid for clinics with Tails integration in the Pet Parent App

filter_clinic_id.name: filter[clinic_id]
filter_clinic_id.description: ID of the clinic from where the entity was created

filter_file_case_id.name: filter[file_case_id]
filter_file_case_id.description: ID of the filecase from where the entity was created

filter_record_id.name: filter[record_id]
filter_record_id.description: ID of the record from where the entity was created

filter_vet_id_array.name: filter[vet_id]
filter_vet_id_array.description: Id of the vet that performed/owns the entity

optional_filter_clinic_id.name: filter[clinic_id]
optional_filter_clinic_id.description: Id of the clinics from where the entity was created

optional_filter_date_between.name: filter[date_between]
optional_filter_date_between.description: Dates between when the entity was created

optional_filter_patient_id_array.name: filter[patient_id]
optional_filter_patient_id_array.description: Ids of the patients that are related to the entity

optional_filter_patient_ids.name: filter[patient_ids]
optional_filter_patient_ids.description: Ids of the patients that are related to the entity

optional_filter_trashed.name: filter[trashed]
optional_filter_trashed.description: Allow to include soft-deleted items (with: include soft-deleted records to the result set; only: return only 'trashed' records at the result set)

optional_filter_vet_id.name: filter[vet_id]
optional_filter_vet_id.description: Id of the vet that performed/owns the entity

include.name: include
include.description: Additional relationships or information to include with the main entity(s) of the response. Each endpoint has its own set of available includes.

per_page.name: per_page
per_page.description: Number of items to retrieve per page

200.title: OK
200.description: The request has succeeded. The client can read the result of the request in the body and the headers of the response.

201.title: Created
201.description: The entity was created and the response body will return the created entity.

204.title: No Content
204.description: The action was successful but there is no content to return.

400.title: Bad Request
400.description: The request was invalid or contained data that was not allowed.

message.example: Requested filter(s) `filter1` are not allowed. Allowed filter(s) are date, query, ...

401.title: Unauthorized
401.description: The authorization token is missing or invalid.

403.title: Forbidden
403.description: The user is not authorized to perform the requested operation.

404.title: Not Found
404.description: The specified resource was not found.

422.title: Unprocessable Content
422.description: This response is sent when a request fails validation. The format is identical on all endpoints.

message.example: The name field is required. (and 1 more error)

name: The name field is required.
email: The email field must be a valid email address.

429.title: Too Many Requests
429.description: The user has sent too many requests in a given amount of time ("rate limiting"). Max 200 requests per minute.

200-pdf.title: OK PDF
200-pdf.description: The response is a PDF file.

200-zip.title: OK ZIP
200-zip.description: The response is a ZIP file.
